heading: Prohibited acts
label: 7406 Prohibited acts
notes: References in TextSection 707(a) of the Western and Central Pacific Fisheries Convention Implementation Act, referred to in par. (4), probably means , which is classified to .section 507(a) of title V of Pub. L. 109–479section 6906(a) of this title

children.text: to violate any provision of this chapter or the regulations issued under this chapter;

to refuse to permit any authorized officer to board, search, or inspect a vessel that is subject to the person’s control in connection with the enforcement of this chapter or the regulations issued under this chapter;
to submit false information pursuant to any requirement under this chapter or the regulations issued under this chapter; or

to commit any offense enumerated in paragraph (4), (5), (7), or (9) of section 707(a) of the Western and Central Pacific Fisheries Convention Implementation Act ().116 U.S.C. 6906(a)See References in Text note below.1
